testCases.testCaseName: Verify Global Search can be accessed from the PenScope home page
testSteps: Login to PenScope with Top Level user credentials
Verify 'Global Search' option is visible in the menu
testCases.expectedResult: Global Search option is accessible and visible to Top Level users

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by NI Number with Exact Match enabled
testSteps: Select 'NI Number' from search type dropdown
Enter a valid NI Number (e.g., AB123456C)
testCases.expectedResult: Only the exact member with matching NI Number is returned in search results

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by NI Number with Exact Match disabled
testSteps: Select 'NI Number' from search type dropdown
testCases.expectedResult: All members with NI Numbers starting with 'AB123' are returned in search results

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by Surname with Exact Match enabled
testCases.expectedResult: Only members with exact surname 'Smith' are returned (case-insensitive)

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by Surname with Exact Match disabled
testCases.expectedResult: All members with surnames starting with 'Smi' are returned (e.g., Smith, Smit, Smither)

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by First Name with Exact Match enabled
testSteps: Select 'First Name' from search type dropdown
testCases.expectedResult: Only members with exact first name 'John' are returned

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by First Name with Exact Match disabled
testSteps: Select 'First Name' from search type dropdown
testCases.expectedResult: All members with first names starting with 'Joh' are returned (e.g., John, Johnny, Johnson)

testCases.testCaseName: Verify search by Date of Birth
testSteps: Select 'Date of Birth' from search type dropdown
testCases.expectedResult: All members with date of birth 01/01/1980 are returned
